feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Delete a row based on a condition in Adobe form
entry.content:
Hi,

  Good day!!! We have a requirement in adobe form where we need to delete a row based on the sales orderitem category but getting a blank row which needs to be hide or deleted.Can anyone guide me how to proceed in javascript.

Have attached screenshot for your reference.

SAP Forms service by Adobe 

Thanks & Regards,

Kathiravan S

entry.title: error when trying to connect to public cloud connection from eclipse
entry.content:
Hi,

 I am trying to connect to SAP Public Cloud system from eclipse via the connection url provided by the client which looks like this. I am using eclipse 2024-12(latest) version and it is showing "You have been successfully logged on

You can close this page and continue in the ABAP Development Tools." in the browser but in eclipse it is showing "Logon to the service instance has failed." Kindly suggest if any solution is there.

entry.title: S4HANA Cloud Trial - Availability of Joule Features
entry.content:
Hi,

I am interested in trying out the SAP Joule features in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud (GROW with SAP). I am willing to take the free trial subscription for this reason. Does anyone know whether the trial version comes pre-activated with Joule features? Thanks in advance for your answer.

entry.title: CDS views of equipment types & groups in public cloud
entry.content: We are maintaining vehicle groups & vehicle types in the customizing (equipment types & equipment groups). I am not able to find the CDS view of equipment types & groups to get the data. Is there any way to get those values?

Limitation on the length of the Customer Master 'name' field.

PERSON_NAME Verma

We would like to setup a communication setup to deploy custom extension UI5 application to Dev Tenant.


Please note we have 3-tier environment

entry.title: Re: API_PRODUCT_SRV not creating the Purchasing View
entry.content:
Hi @Thandi ,

The API you are using is correct, but the payload format does not match the schema. I have provided a sample schema below. Modify your schema (only plant data) and try uploading it again, this will create the purchasing view.

"to_Plant": {
"results": [
               {
                 "Plant": "XXXX",
                 "PurchasingGroup": "XXXX",
                 "ProfitCenter": "",
                 "ConsumptionTaxCtrlCode": "85011011"
              }
       ]
}

entry.title: Looking for Late Payment interest and penalties reports in S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Can anyone provide samples or point me in the direction of Late Payment Interest and Penalty Reports in S4 HANA Public Cloud. This is an EU Regulation which requires organisations to make payments to suppliers for late payment of accounts. 

Thanks

Una

(P.S. Name on SAP is Eamonn as I took over superuser account, but I cannot change).

entry.title: Parked Invoice for specific suppliers
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to select some problematic suplliers and when Im posting an invoice frm these suppliers it should goes parked, can I do that?

entry.title: Is "Amount Split" tab available in the Fiori screen of SAP s/4hana public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I would like to know if the "Amount Split" tab is also available in the application Create Supplier Invoice app in SAP S/4hana public Cloud? 

Thanks!

Regards

Meri

entry.title: In Public Cloud, can I generate Defect automatically for the Inspected Unit that was rejected?
entry.content:
We cannot use Quantity Based Inspection Points in Public Cloud (Feb 2025). We thus create a 100% Inspection and SAP allow us to record a result for each Unit.
I want to automatically generate a Defect when a Unit is Rejected. The problem is that SAP creates the Defect when the average of the Characteristic is outside specification (Rejected).
Any idea what I can do to generate a Defect per rejected Unit?
Using MIC with 92 Major characteristic, Defect active, Defect Coding added, in Routing (03 Insp Lot) with Sampling Procedure 100% Inspection. Defect Class = 92 Major defect.

I would like a Defect to be created for Unit 3. If the average result for Char 20 is outside specifications, it creates a Defect.

Thanx in advance
Corne

entry.title: Update procedure for SAP Public Cloud version and tool to validate the business influence
entry.content:
Recently, the SAP public cloud has released new version 2502. According to the updates, I have some doubts:

1. What is the standard procedure to update the system?

Usually if we need to change the system, we need to change the configuration from customizing system, to test system and then to production system.

Do the SAP version updates also follow the same sequence and generate Customizing Transports? 

 

2. Is there any tool to validate or test the business influence caused by the updates?

If the SAP version updates bring some changes which may have impact on our current business, how can we test or validate these influence? Is there any recommended tool? 

I am looking forward to reply. Thank you for all answers in advance.

entry.title: [R] APP职能范围-实际丢失（R）
entry.content:
系统周末完成升级之后，发现APP职能范围-实际找不到了，但是此前这个APP并没有打弃用标识，麻烦老师帮忙看一下。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to create Inbound Delivery and HU with API
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

we recieve packed products from Subcontracting Packers and recieve ASN info to create Inbound Delivery and Handling Units (Nested).

 

we have checked several APIs and tried the below API (Pack Products into Handling Units in WM-Managed Storage Location )

POST <host>/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_handlingunit/srvd_a2x/sap/handlingunit/0001/HandlingUnitItem
X-CSRF-Token: kF1uaxWzKBzvw8_6BXafug==
{
"Warehouse": "1050",
"HandlingUnitExternalID": "810003978",
"StockItemUUID": "b7036e63-34a6-1eee-91de-f47ede0461cd",
"HandlingUnitQuantity": 3,
"HandlingUnitQuantityUnit": "EA",
"HandlingUnitAltUnitOfMeasure": "EA"
}

 

But the API ends up in error /SCWM/L3/104 - Stock for required data does not exist. we are unable to recieve ASN with HUs and createInbound Delivery with HU in the warehouse .

entry.title: USER DETAILS IN SAP PUBLIC CLOUD
entry.content:
Hi Sapian,

Please mention the table or CD views where I can see the user details, such as his User ID, Username, and email address. 

Environment: SAP Public cloud (not integrated with SuccessFactors)

Regards

What are the available scope item's and How to activate a scope item in CBC

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud TM and WM Integration for Inbound Purchase Order
entry.content:
I'm looking for some detailed information for when SAP is planning on delivering a solution to integrate purchase order/inbound deliveries through the advanced shipping and receiving functionality in S/4HANA Public Cloud. I've tried looking at the product roadmap, but I didn't see any references for this particular scenario.

Has anyone else faced this restriction? What other types of solutions did you recommend for your customers who are trying to utilize both TM and WM throughout their operations?

entry.title: Restrictions in app Profit Centers - Actuals
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

We would like to implement restrictions in the Profit Centers - Actuals app to ensure that users can only view data for the company code in which they are employed.

In our setup, we have one profit center assigned to all company codes. However, we want to restrict users so that:

  • Some users can only see data for a specific company code (e.g., Germany).
  • Others can only see data for a different company code (e.g., Switzerland).

The relevant role for this app is Divisional Accountant.

Is it possible to enforce such restrictions, and if so, what would be the recommended approach?

Thank you in advance for your support!

entry.title: Print HU label at Product WT confirmation in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
We have a business requirement to print HU labels after picking and packing. We want to print the label after the material has been committed to the Handling Unit (not at HU creation).

Looking at OPD, I don't see an available option to represent this. It looks like there is a flag for 'HU Task exists'. This should work, as when the material is committed to the HU, it also creates the drop off HU Task. However, this doesn't seem to trigger our outputs.

Is there an OPD trigger for Handling Unit output type to trigger HU label creation at product WT confirmation?
